ICE (Yes vs No) 297 0.37 (0.00, 3.86) −63.2 0.465
%Δ in Odds represents percent change in the odds of needing surgery in the predictor (computed as (OR − 1) × 100). Negative values indicate lower odds of having an OA. 
ice_vars <- c("age", "sex", "race_eth", "sinusitis", "diabetes",
              "immunocompromise", "drug/alc", "asthma", "trauma", 
              "prior_surgery", "surgery_adm","dental_infection",
              "nldo/infection", "spa", "oa")

ice_vars_qt <- ifelse(grepl("/", ice_vars), 
                      paste0("`", ice_vars, "`"), ice_vars)

ice_form <- as.formula(paste("oa ~", paste(ice_vars_qt, collapse = " + ")))
ice.model <- logistf(ice_form, data=oc_cleaned)
## Warning in model.matrix.default(mt, mf): the response appeared on the
## right-hand side and was dropped
## Warning in model.matrix.default(mt, mf): problem with term 15 in model.matrix:
## no columns are assigned
summary(ice.model)
## logistf(formula = ice_form, data = oc_cleaned)
## 
## Model fitted by Penalized ML
## Coefficients:
##                                    coef   se(coef)  lower 0.95  upper 0.95
## (Intercept)                -1.547307004 1.14751480 -4.23104824  0.68175716
## age                         0.006015269 0.01038313 -0.01516732  0.02740416
## sexMale                    -0.847700416 0.36701822 -1.60896672 -0.10280289
## race_ethHispanic            0.576394273 0.95937421 -1.25406122  2.98129795
## race_ethWhite non-Hispanic  0.124781325 0.87756672 -1.48742919  2.42683971
## sinusitisYes               -1.173679712 0.39280340 -2.00910479 -0.39565269
## diabetesYes                -1.218890694 0.52058934 -2.39093140 -0.21409918
## immunocompromiseYes        -0.556405652 0.50949693 -1.68312910  0.42478850
## `drug/alc`Yes              -0.037719213 0.52261351 -1.16883893  1.00065942
## asthmaYes                   0.337429974 0.69287535 -1.22615999  1.71108181
## traumaYes                  -0.091769660 0.47516877 -1.09196218  0.85636452
## prior_surgeryYes           -0.247103785 0.56381269 -1.48902817  0.86486388
## surgery_admYes              1.731793399 0.38603239  0.97685562  2.56417672
## dental_infectionYes        -0.123720002 0.78416051 -1.97963623  1.38019720
## `nldo/infection`Yes        -2.329387627 1.58474875 -7.32886620  0.36941537
## spaYes                     -3.538141667 1.33266546 -8.39713940 -1.48657051
##                                   Chisq            p method
## (Intercept)                 1.793792753 1.804647e-01      2
## age                         0.310858790 5.771537e-01      2
## sexMale                     4.974094490 2.572967e-02      2
## race_ethHispanic            0.341624159 5.588932e-01      2
## race_ethWhite non-Hispanic  0.018198560 8.926893e-01      2
## sinusitisYes                8.932944406 2.800725e-03      2
## diabetesYes                 5.795312569 1.606896e-02      2
## immunocompromiseYes         1.184012909 2.765406e-01      2
## `drug/alc`Yes               0.004773499 9.449176e-01      2
## asthmaYes                   0.205749836 6.501192e-01      2
## traumaYes                   0.034816720 8.519802e-01      2
## prior_surgeryYes            0.178091397 6.730186e-01      2
## surgery_admYes             21.887029155 2.891820e-06      2
## dental_infectionYes         0.022364489 8.811215e-01      2
## `nldo/infection`Yes         2.789269824 9.489746e-02      2
## spaYes                     17.290201961 3.208369e-05      2
## 
## Method: 1-Wald, 2-Profile penalized log-likelihood, 3-None
## 
## Likelihood ratio test=66.69617 on 15 df, p=1.719931e-08, n=297
## Wald test = 84.27131 on 15 df, p = 1.146805e-11
# OR & 95% CI
fbm_ice_tbl <- data.frame(
  #term = names(nfs.model.fbm$coefficients),
  RR = exp(ice.model$coefficients),
  LL = exp(ice.model$ci.lower),
  UL = exp(ice.model$ci.upper),
  p_value = ice.model$prob) %>% 
  mutate(
    # % change in odds (per unit increase)
    pct_chg = (RR  - 1) * 100,
    pct_LL = (LL - 1) * 100,
    pct_UL = (UL - 1) * 100) %>% 
  mutate(pct_ci = sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f)", pct_LL, pct_UL),
         RR_ci = sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f)", LL, UL)) 

fbm_ice_tbl
##                                    RR           LL         UL      p_value
## (Intercept)                0.21282033 0.0145371441  1.9773492 1.804647e-01
## age                        1.00603340 0.9849471208  1.0277831 5.771537e-01
## sexMale                    0.42839894 0.2000942605  0.9023048 2.572967e-02
## race_ethHispanic           1.77961006 0.2853435969 19.7133870 5.588932e-01
## race_ethWhite non-Hispanic 1.13290069 0.2259527908 11.3230413 8.926893e-01
## sinusitisYes               0.30922698 0.1341086759  0.6732405 2.800725e-03
## diabetesYes                0.29555785 0.0915443799  0.8072683 1.606896e-02
## immunocompromiseYes        0.57326588 0.1857917039  1.5292669 2.765406e-01
## `drug/alc`Yes              0.96298330 0.3107275075  2.7200749 9.449176e-01
## asthmaYes                  1.40134147 0.2934171406  5.5349460 6.501192e-01
## traumaYes                  0.91231527 0.3355574229  2.3545851 8.519802e-01
## prior_surgeryYes           0.78105963 0.2255917854  2.3746828 6.730186e-01
## surgery_admYes             5.65077893 2.6560913492 12.9899596 2.891820e-06
## dental_infectionYes        0.88362722 0.1381194722  3.9756855 8.811215e-01
## `nldo/infection`Yes        0.09735535 0.0006563173  1.4468885 9.489746e-02
## spaYes                     0.02906729 0.0002255115  0.2261469 3.208369e-05
##                                pct_chg     pct_LL      pct_UL            pct_ci
## (Intercept)                -78.7179673 -98.546286   97.734921   (-98.55, 97.73)
## age                          0.6033397  -1.505288    2.778311     (-1.51, 2.78)
## sexMale                    -57.1601060 -79.990574   -9.769519   (-79.99, -9.77)
## race_ethHispanic            77.9610059 -71.465640 1871.338704 (-71.47, 1871.34)
## race_ethWhite non-Hispanic  13.2900688 -77.404721 1032.304134 (-77.40, 1032.30)
## sinusitisYes               -69.0773021 -86.589132  -32.675952  (-86.59, -32.68)
## diabetesYes                -70.4442151 -90.845562  -19.273169  (-90.85, -19.27)
## immunocompromiseYes        -42.6734118 -81.420830   52.926694   (-81.42, 52.93)
## `drug/alc`Yes               -3.7016704 -68.927249  172.007491  (-68.93, 172.01)
## asthmaYes                   40.1341474 -70.658286  453.494601  (-70.66, 453.49)
## traumaYes                   -8.7684732 -66.444258  135.458506  (-66.44, 135.46)
## prior_surgeryYes           -21.8940373 -77.440821  137.468283  (-77.44, 137.47)
## surgery_admYes             465.0778929 165.609135 1198.995957 (165.61, 1199.00)
## dental_infectionYes        -11.6372780 -86.188053  297.568555  (-86.19, 297.57)
## `nldo/infection`Yes        -90.2644653 -99.934368   44.688847   (-99.93, 44.69)
## spaYes                     -97.0932706 -99.977449  -77.385310  (-99.98, -77.39)
##                                    RR_ci
## (Intercept)                 (0.01, 1.98)
## age                         (0.98, 1.03)
## sexMale                     (0.20, 0.90)
## race_ethHispanic           (0.29, 19.71)
## race_ethWhite non-Hispanic (0.23, 11.32)
## sinusitisYes                (0.13, 0.67)
## diabetesYes                 (0.09, 0.81)
## immunocompromiseYes         (0.19, 1.53)
## `drug/alc`Yes               (0.31, 2.72)
## asthmaYes                   (0.29, 5.53)
## traumaYes                   (0.34, 2.35)
## prior_surgeryYes            (0.23, 2.37)
## surgery_admYes             (2.66, 12.99)
## dental_infectionYes         (0.14, 3.98)
## `nldo/infection`Yes         (0.00, 1.45)
## spaYes                      (0.00, 0.23)
ice_tbl <- fbm_ice_tbl %>%
  rownames_to_column("Predictor") %>% 
  mutate(n_fbm= nrow(model.frame(ice.model)),
      Predictor = recode(
        Predictor,
        "age" = "Age (per 1yr)",
        "sexMale" = "Sex (Male vs Female)",
        "race_ethHispanic" = "HL vs Blk non-HL",
        "race_ethWhite non-Hispanic" = "White non-HL vs Blk non-HL)",
        "sinusitisYes" = "Sinusitis (Yes vs No)",
        "diabetesYes" = "Diabetes (Yes vs No)",
        "immunocompromiseYes" = "Immuno (Yes vs No)",
        "`drug/alc`Yes" = "Drugs/Alcohol (Yes vs No)",
        "asthmaYes" = "Asthma (Yes vs No)",
        "traumaYes" = "Trauma (Yes vs No)",
        "prior_surgeryYes" = "Prior Surgery (Yes vs No)",
        "surgery_admYes" = "Surgery in Admission (Yes vs No)",
        "dental_infectionYes" = "Dental (Yes vs No)",
        "`nldo/infection`Yes" = "NLDO (Yes vs No)",
        "spaYes" = "SPA (Yes vs No)",
        "oaYes" = "OA (Yes vs No)")) %>% 
  select(Predictor, n_fbm, RR, RR_ci, pct_chg, p_value) %>%
  filter(Predictor != "(Intercept)") %>% 
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    n_fbm = "N", 
    RR = "OR",
    pct_chg = "%Δ in Odds",
    RR_ci = "95% CI",
    p_value  = "P-value") %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(RR), decimals = 2) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(pct_chg), decimals = 1) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = p_value, decimals = 3) %>%
    # bold specific text
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = everything())) %>%
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()) %>%
  # highlight significant predictors <0.05
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#FFF3CD"),
            locations = list(
              cells_body(rows = p_value < 0.05),
              cells_stub(rows = p_value < 0.05))) %>% 
  # p-value formatting like your other tables
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(columns = p_value),
    fn = function(x) ifelse(as.numeric(x) < 0.001, "<0.001",
                            format(round(as.numeric(x), 3), nsmall = 3))) %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size = "small") %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = "%Δ in Odds represents percent change in the odds of needing surgery
    in the predictor (computed as (OR − 1) × 100). Negative values indicate lower
    odds of having an ICE.") %>% 
  tab_header(
    title = "Factors Associated with ICE Among Adults Admitted for OC",
    subtitle = "Firth Logistic Regression Analysis") %>% 
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = "small",
    #heading.align = "left",
    data_row.padding = px(3),
    table.width = pct(85),
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    table.border.bottom.width = px(2))

ice_tbl
Factors Associated with ICE Among Adults Admitted for OC
Firth Logistic Regression Analysis
Predictor N OR 95% CI %Δ in Odds P-value
Age (per 1yr) 297 1.01 (0.98, 1.03) 0.6 0.577
Sex (Male vs Female) 297 0.43 (0.20, 0.90) −57.2 0.026
HL vs Blk non-HL 297 1.78 (0.29, 19.71) 78.0 0.559
White non-HL vs Blk non-HL) 297 1.13 (0.23, 11.32) 13.3 0.893
Sinusitis (Yes vs No) 297 0.31 (0.13, 0.67) −69.1 0.003
Diabetes (Yes vs No) 297 0.30 (0.09, 0.81) −70.4 0.016
Immuno (Yes vs No) 297 0.57 (0.19, 1.53) −42.7 0.277
Drugs/Alcohol (Yes vs No) 297 0.96 (0.31, 2.72) −3.7 0.945
Asthma (Yes vs No) 297 1.40 (0.29, 5.53) 40.1 0.650
Trauma (Yes vs No) 297 0.91 (0.34, 2.35) −8.8 0.852
Prior Surgery (Yes vs No) 297 0.78 (0.23, 2.37) −21.9 0.673
Surgery in Admission (Yes vs No) 297 5.65 (2.66, 12.99) 465.1 <0.001
Dental (Yes vs No) 297 0.88 (0.14, 3.98) −11.6 0.881
NLDO (Yes vs No) 297 0.10 (0.00, 1.45) −90.3 0.095
SPA (Yes vs No) 297 0.03 (0.00, 0.23) −97.1 <0.001
%Δ in Odds represents percent change in the odds of needing surgery in the predictor (computed as (OR − 1) × 100). Negative values indicate lower odds of having an ICE.
Briz-Redón, Á., Corberán-Vallet, A., Iftimi, A., & Íñiguez, C. (2025). A mixture of distributed lag non-linear models to account for spatially heterogeneous exposure–lag–response associations. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2512.01508
Gasparrini, A. (2025). Dlnm: Distributed lag non-linear models. Comprehensive R Archive Network (CRAN). Retrieved from https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/dlnm/dlnm.pdf
Luong, N. T. (2025). Distributed lag non-linear models (DLNM). https://ntluong95.quarto.pub/gothenburg_ws2025/2-dlnm/dlnm.html.
OpenAI. (2025). ChatGPT. Retrieved from https://chat.openai.com/
Shafqat, A., & Park, E. (2025). Broad applications of distributed lag non-linear model in public health: A comprehensive review. GeoHealth, 9, e2025GH001608.
